pages.name: PadMapper · SF 3+BR ≤$12k
pages.text: San Francisco CA Apartments for Rent | PadMapper Use your current location Searches Favorites Post a pad Sign in Show the map Get to know San Francisco 1,061 APARTMENTS 20 NEIGHBORHOODS Rent Trends for Apartments in San Francisco May 2026 Bedroom count San Francisco vs Last Month Studio $2,646 up 5.84% 1 Bedroom $4,000 up 3.90% 2 Bedroom $5,500 up 2.98% 3 Bedroom $6,838 up 14.06% 4 Bedroom $9,350 up 14.72% Median rent as of May 17, 2026 This May, we've analyzed our 1,061 listings in San Francisco to determine the rent trend. We're updating our tables in real time to give you the most up to date San Francisco median apartment rent prices by bedroom count. The median rent for a studio apartment decreased by 0.15% to $2,646, while the median rent for a 1 bedroom apartment increased by 0.13% to $4,000. Cities Near San Francisco Broadmoor Apartments Brisbane Apartments Colma Apartments Daly City Apartments Sausalito Apartments Belvedere Tiburon Apartments Tiburon Apartments South San Francisco Apartments Strawberry Apartments San Bruno Apartments Top Neighborhoods in San Francisco SOMA Apartments South Beach Apartments Civic Center Apartments Downtown Apartments Dogpatch Apartments Hayes Valley Apartments Tenderloin Apartments Mission Apartments Apartment Types in San Francisco Pet Friendly Apartments in San Francisco Cheap Apartments in San Francisco Luxury Apartments in San Francisco Low Income Apartments in San Francisco Move In Special Apartments in San Francisco Utilities Included Apartments in San Francisco No Security Deposit Apartments in San Francisco Short Term Rentals in San Francisco Find Your Dream Apartment for Rent in San Francisco PadMapper has 1,061 condos, houses, and apartments for rent in San Francisco. Specifically, 259 studio apartments, 403 one-bedroom apartments, 318 two-bedroom apartments, 60 three-bedroom apartments are currently available for rent. We have options to filter by price, bedroom count, bathroom count, long-term or short-term, housing type, pet friendly, no broker fee, and you can search for an apartment by custom keywords.
